name: Engility Holdings, Inc.
description: Engility Holdings, Inc. was a leading provider of highly technical, professional, and advisory services to the U.S. government, including the Department of Defense, the intelligence community, and federal civilian agencies. The company specialized in systems engineering, cybersecurity, high-performance computing, enterprise modernization, and mission support services. Engility was acquired by Science Applications International Corporation (SAIC) in January 2019.
